name: Athens Golf Center
about: Athens Golf Center is a comprehensive golf training facility in Lexington offering a Toptracer range with real-time shot tracking and interactive games, along with professional instruction and personalized club fitting services. The facility includes covered, heated bays for year-round practice, a 300-foot Bermuda turf hitting area with a short-game facility, and options for both mat and grass hitting. Center is committed to enhancing golfer experiences through technology and personalized services, offering a full range of products including new and used clubs, on-site repairs, and rental equipment.
why_golfers_like_it: Toptracer technology for detailed swing analysis and interactive gameplay
Year-round practice with heated, covered bays and Bermuda grass hitting area
Comprehensive services from lessons and fitting to club repair and shop
Flexible pricing options with different ball bucket sizes and VIP bay rentals

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service
No mention of alcohol service or BYOB policy

simulator_hardware.notes: Interactive screens with ball tracking and virtual golf capabilities

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, rental clubs are available for $5 per set.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No specific policy mentioned, but the facility focuses on golf services without mentioning food/drink service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: No specific time mentioned, but virtual rounds are available at bucket-list venues like Pebble Beach, Oakmont, and others.

faq.question: Is Athens Golf Center kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is described as beginner-friendly and offers rental clubs, making it suitable for junior golfers.
